aeo_readiness.summary: The website has some foundational elements for AEO but lacks depth in content, reviews, and structured data implementation.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords for HVAC services in Atlanta.
Enhance content with location-specific keywords and detailed service descriptions.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has JSON-LD and Microdata schema types implemented.
gbp_analysis.summary: While schema markup is present, it is not fully utilized to enhance Google Business Profile (GBP) visibility. The lack of GBP integration and reviews is a significant drawback.
critical_issues: No active Google Business Profile is referenced or linked.
Missing GBP categories and attributes specific to HVAC services.
Lack of customer reviews and engagement on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: The business has inconsistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) citations across the website and potentially other platforms.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across the website, Google Business Profile, and all online directories.
Claim and verify the business on major citation platforms like Yelp, Bing, and industry-specific directories.
Regularly audit and update NAP information to maintain accuracy.

schema_gaps: ServiceArea schema is missing, which is crucial for local HVAC businesses.
LocalBusiness schema is not fully utilized; missing properties like openingHours, paymentAccepted, and additional details about services.
Review and rating schema are not implemented, which could help in displaying rich snippets.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized and industry-specific content to improve search visibility.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local customers searching for HVAC services in Atlanta due to poor local SEO and GBP integration.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating blog posts and service pages with Atlanta-specific keywords and customer testimonials.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as an authority in the Atlanta HVAC market by publishing case studies, industry reports, and engaging with local business communities.

page_title: Atlanta Industrial & Commercial HVAC Company | Galgon HVAC Services
